description: All combat abilities: base attacks for martial classes, lightwielding spells, materium spells, shadow arts spells, and martial ability sets. Spell cost is Materium unless noted. Martial ability cost is Stamina.

base_attacks.name: Shield Bash
base_attacks.effect: Minor stagger — reduces target's next attack accuracy by 5%
base_attacks.note: Fallback when special abilities unavailable. Requires shield equipped.

base_attacks.name: Quick Slash
base_attacks.effect: Counts as a consecutive hit for Momentum tracking

base_attacks.name: Basic Thrust
base_attacks.effect: +10% accuracy — precision strike, easy to land

base_attacks.name: Commander's Strike
base_attacks.effect: One adjacent ally gains +5% damage on their next attack this turn

base_attacks.name: Quick Arrow
base_attacks.effect: No special effect — standard ranged strike

base_attacks.name: Hunting Strike
base_attacks.effect: Bonded companion attacks the same target for 6 bonus Physical damage

base_attacks.name: Swift Shot
base_attacks.effect: Can be used immediately before or after movement without penalty

base_attacks.name: Shadow Jab
base_attacks.effect: Deals +2 Shadow bonus damage if attacking from a shadow tile

base_attacks.name: Quick Stab
base_attacks.effect: No special effect — rapid, untracked strike

base_attacks.name: Cheap Shot
base_attacks.effect: 10% chance to interrupt the target's next action

base_attacks.name: Knife Strike
base_attacks.effect: No special effect — used only when no trap or explosive is available

spells.effect: Removes all debuffs from target; bonus damage vs corrupted
